title: TIME.1
overview: As Toru Amuro, Rei Furuya starts his day bright and early to open up Café Poirot, the bustling coffee shop located under the Mouri detective agency.

title: TIME.2
overview: While working at Poirot, Rei has to duck out to chase down a fugitive. During his intense daily workout, Rei comes across an adorable little dog.

title: TIME.3
overview: After an eventful night, Rei goes undercover to a popular curry shop and meets up with Kazami, who bravely orders the spiciest curry on the menu.

title: TIME.4
overview: While chasing a thief, Rei unknowingly participates in an obstacle course game show. Later, as he teaches a boy to ride a bike, a memory surfaces.

title: TIME.5
overview: After a brief encounter with an FBI agent, Rei washes his beloved car and discovers an adorable little dog that's determined to win his heart.

title: TIME.6
overview: Rei doesn’t know what to call his furry friend yet — but discovers that the dog loves his guitar playing, which inspires the perfect name.
